series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Medicaid Consumer Hotline Call Recording
series_metadata.series_description: All records of recordings of telephone calls received by the Ohio Medicaid Consumer Hotline identified as being needed by the Ohio Department of Medicaid (ODM).

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 1 year, then destroy provided audits are completed, reports are released, and all discrepancies resolved., Electronic: Erase
